stepText: Do the Fremennik Exiles, A Night at the Theatre (lamps on ranging), Hopespear’s Will. Start Monkey Madness II until you have access to Kruk’s Dungeon (with the Maniacal monkeys).
itemsNeeded: tons and tons of items (these are linear quests so just follow the wiki)
